steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content:
Left of blank: A dependent relative clause interrupting the main clause.
Right of blank: The main verb of the independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
When a relative clause interrupts the main clause by appearing between subject and verb, a comma must close it to signal where the main clause resumes.

Choice C (village, tells) correctly provides this comma. The other choices omit it or use incorrect punctuation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
